title: Level Z - Marium's Soulslike Weaponry
description: A LevelZ for Marium's Soulslike Weaponry.
body:
A LevelZ Addon for the Marium's Soulslike Weaponry mod in the RPG series.

This addon adds level requirements for most weaponry and blocks in the mod to fit seemlessly with LevelZ. This way you can add this mod to your RPG modpacks without worrying about people skipping progression.

Did I miss something or do you have any further suggestions for other mods I should make compatible? Follow the discord link and let me know!
